entry.title: 🥈 XAG/USD Elliott Wave Analysis — Targets $102 and $118 | March 2026
entry.summary: Silver mirrors gold's structure — Wave 2 complete, Wave 3 loading. Current price: $83.26 (March 4, 2026) Key observation: For the first time since December 2023, gold-silver correlation divergence has reached extreme levels. Last seen before February 5 — historically this precedes a sharp convergence…
entry.content:
Silver mirrors gold's structure — Wave 2 complete, Wave 3 loading.

Current price: $83.26 (March 4, 2026)

Key observation: For the first time since December 2023, gold-silver correlation divergence has reached extreme levels. Last seen before February 5 — historically this precedes a sharp convergence move upward in silver.

Wave Structure (Daily):

  • Wave 1 completed ✅
  • Wave 2 completed ✅ — held above blue trend line (Dow Theory confirmed)
  • Wave (i)(ii) sub-waves forming
  • Impulse begins on close above the descending black trendline

Price Targets:

  • 🎯 Target 1 — $102 (FE 100.0)
  • 🎯 Target 2 — $118 (FE 161.8) — statistically more probable based on historical patterns

Dow Theory confirmation: Price did NOT close below the blue ascending trendline — bullish structure intact.

⚠️ Signal to watch: Impulse wave activates on daily close above descending black trendline.

by Alex ManVal — analysis since 2008. Not a trading recommendation.

entry.title: 🥇 XAU/USD Elliott Wave Analysis — Targets $5,745 and $6,240 | March 2026
entry.summary: Gold is completing Wave 2 correction and preparing for a powerful Wave 3 impulse move higher. Current price: $5,112 (March 4, 2026) Wave Structure (Daily): Price Targets: Macro backdrop: New Fed leadership cycle adds uncertainty. Historically, gold performs strongly during Fed transition periods. Silver is…
entry.content:
Gold is completing Wave 2 correction and preparing for a powerful Wave 3 impulse move higher.

Current price: $5,112 (March 4, 2026)

Wave Structure (Daily):

  • Waves 1-2 completed ✅
  • Wave 3 in progress — sub-waves (i)(ii)(iii)(iv) visible
  • Wave (v) of 3 targets imminent

Price Targets:

  • 🎯 Target 1 — $5,745 (FE 100.0) — primary target, Wave 3 completion
  • 🎯 Target 2 — $6,240 (FE 161.8) — extended Wave 3 scenario

Macro backdrop: New Fed leadership cycle adds uncertainty. Historically, gold performs strongly during Fed transition periods. Silver is closely tracking gold with correlation tightening over the past 30 days.

Method: Elliott Wave + Fibonacci Extensions + Dow Theory

by Alex ManVal — analysis since 2008. Not a trading recommendation.
